en.title: Apple Brownie
en.description: A healthy, sugar-free and gluten-free apple brownie — perfect for breakfast or a nutritious snack!
ingredients: 20g unsweetened cocoa powder (cacau em pó desnatado)
instructions: In a blender, blend the apple and eggs together.
Add the unsweetened cocoa powder and honey; blend until smooth.
Pour the batter into a baking mould.
Bake in an air fryer at 180°C (356°F) for 12–15 minutes.

pt.title: Brownie de Maçã
pt.description: A healthy, sugar-free and gluten-free apple brownie — perfect for breakfast or a nutritious snack!
ingredients: 20g unsweetened cocoa powder (cacau em pó desnatado)
instructions: In a blender, blend the apple and eggs together.
Add the unsweetened cocoa powder and honey; blend until smooth.
Pour the batter into a baking mould.
Bake in an air fryer at 180°C (356°F) for 12–15 minutes.

en.title: Broccoli Pasta with Chickpea Tomato Sauce
en.description: Homemade broccoli pasta with a protein-rich chickpea tomato sauce — a creative high-protein dinner.
instructions: Cook the broccoli until soft, then mash.
Knead with flour and salt until a firm dough ball forms.
Using scissors, cut the dough directly into boiling water. Cook for 5 minutes, then drain.
Fry the garlic and chickpeas, add tomato purée and tomato paste. Combine.
Season and toss the broccoli pasta with the sauce.
Top with basil and vegan parmesan.

pt.title: Massa de Brócolos
pt.description: Homemade broccoli pasta with a protein-rich chickpea tomato sauce — a creative high-protein dinner.
instructions: Cook the broccoli until soft, then mash.
Knead with flour and salt until a firm dough ball forms.
Using scissors, cut the dough directly into boiling water. Cook for 5 minutes, then drain.
Fry the garlic and chickpeas, add tomato purée and tomato paste. Combine.
Season and toss the broccoli pasta with the sauce.
Top with basil and vegan parmesan.

en.title: Egg Cloud Sandwich
en.description: A fluffy, high-protein egg cloud wrap with chicken and veggies — light and satisfying.
instructions: Whip the egg whites until fluffy and form into a circular shape on a baking sheet.
Bake until set and lightly golden.
Cook the chicken breast and slice.
Spread cream cheese on the egg cloud wrap.
Add shredded cheese, arugula, sliced bell pepper, and chicken.
Add hot sauce if desired, fold, and serve.

pt.title: Sanduíche de Nuvem de Ovo
pt.description: Um wrap fofo de nuvem de ovo, rico em proteína, com frango e vegetais — leve e saciante.
instructions: Whip the egg whites until fluffy and form into a circular shape on a baking sheet.
Bake until set and lightly golden.
Cook the chicken breast and slice.
Spread cream cheese on the egg cloud wrap.
Add shredded cheese, arugula, sliced bell pepper, and chicken.
Add hot sauce if desired, fold, and serve.

en.title: Healthy Marshmallows
en.description: Healthy marshmallows made with just one ingredient! Kids absolutely love this super easy recipe.
instructions: Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water and add cold water.
Beat well for about 8 minutes until the mixture doubles in volume.
Let it cool, then refrigerate until set.
Ready to enjoy!

pt.title: Marshmallows Saudáveis
pt.description: Healthy marshmallows made with just one ingredient! Kids absolutely love this super easy recipe.
instructions: Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water and add cold water.
Beat well for about 8 minutes until the mixture doubles in volume.
Let it cool, then refrigerate until set.
Ready to enjoy!

en.title: Garlic & Onion Seasoning
en.description: A homemade garlic and onion seasoning blend using kitchen scraps — zero waste and full of flavour.
ingredients: 1 tbsp coarse salt (sal grosso) — ratio 50/50 with blended seasoning
instructions: Dry the onion and garlic skins thoroughly.
Blend the skins into a powder.
Mix with coarse salt in a 50/50 ratio for Seasoning 1.
For Seasoning 2, combine parsley, rosemary, 2 tbsp of Seasoning 1, and olive oil.
Store in an airtight container.

pt.title: Tempero de Alho e Cebola
pt.description: A homemade garlic and onion seasoning blend using kitchen scraps — zero waste and full of flavour.
ingredients: 1 tbsp coarse salt (sal grosso) — ratio 50/50 with blended seasoning
instructions: Dry the onion and garlic skins thoroughly.
Blend the skins into a powder.
Mix with coarse salt in a 50/50 ratio for Seasoning 1.
For Seasoning 2, combine parsley, rosemary, 2 tbsp of Seasoning 1, and olive oil.
Store in an airtight container.

en.title: Apple Marshmallow
en.description: A fluffy apple marshmallow treat — naturally sweet, made from real apples and gelatin.
ingredients: 600g peeled and diced apples (maçãs descascadas e picadas)
instructions: Cut peeled apples into cubes.
Place apples with water in a pot. Cook on medium heat for 10–15 minutes until soft.
Blend the apples with a blender or immersion blender until smooth.
Add the gelatin powder directly (no need to hydrate — the hot purée will do it). Mix well.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Beat with an electric mixer on high for about 20 minutes. The mixture will become 2–3× larger and turn white.
Pour into a mould lined with parchment paper. Cover with cling film.
Refrigerate for 2–3 hours until fully set.

pt.title: Marshmallow de Maçã
pt.description: A fluffy apple marshmallow treat — naturally sweet, made from real apples and gelatin.
ingredients: 600g peeled and diced apples (maçãs descascadas e picadas)
instructions: Cut peeled apples into cubes.
Place apples with water in a pot. Cook on medium heat for 10–15 minutes until soft.
Blend the apples with a blender or immersion blender until smooth.
Add the gelatin powder directly (no need to hydrate — the hot purée will do it). Mix well.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Beat with an electric mixer on high for about 20 minutes. The mixture will become 2–3× larger and turn white.
Pour into a mould lined with parchment paper. Cover with cling film.
Refrigerate for 2–3 hours until fully set.

en.title: Chocolate Yogurt Cheesecake
en.description: A simple 4-ingredient chocolate yogurt cheesecake — creamy, rich, and surprisingly healthy.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Add Greek yogurt to a mixing bowl.
Crack in the eggs.
Add cocoa powder and sweetener.
Whisk until smooth and lump-free.
Pour batter into a lined baking pan.
Bake for 30–35 minutes until set.
Cool completely at room temperature.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Slice and serve cold.

pt.title: Cheesecake de Iogurte e Chocolate
pt.description: Um cheesecake de iogurte e chocolate com apenas 4 ingredientes — cremoso, rico e surpreendentemente saudável.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Add Greek yogurt to a mixing bowl.
Crack in the eggs.
Add cocoa powder and sweetener.
Whisk until smooth and lump-free.
Pour batter into a lined baking pan.
Bake for 30–35 minutes until set.
Cool completely at room temperature.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Slice and serve cold.

en.title: Homemade Mayonnaise
en.description: A quick homemade mayonnaise made with eggs, olive oil, and vinegar — simple and delicious.
instructions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend well until everything is combined.
Gradually add more olive oil until you reach the desired consistency.
Serve immediately or store in the fridge.

pt.title: Maionese Caseira
pt.description: A quick homemade mayonnaise made with eggs, olive oil, and vinegar — simple and delicious.
instructions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend well until everything is combined.
Gradually add more olive oil until you reach the desired consistency.
Serve immediately or store in the fridge.

en.title: Raspberry Cheesecake Bites
en.description: A guilt-free sweet treat for when you're watching your weight — creamy raspberry cheesecake bites.
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt with maple syrup.
Spoon a layer of crushed biscuits into the bottom of small moulds or cupcake liners.
Add a layer of the yogurt mixture.
Top with raspberries.
Freeze until set, then enjoy as a cold treat.

pt.title: Mini Cheesecakes de Framboesa
pt.description: Uma sobremesa leve para quando estás a controlar o peso — mini cheesecakes cremosos de framboesa.
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt with maple syrup.
Spoon a layer of crushed biscuits into the bottom of small moulds or cupcake liners.
Add a layer of the yogurt mixture.
Top with raspberries.
Freeze until set, then enjoy as a cold treat.

en.title: Raspberry Yogurt Bark
en.description: A colourful frozen yogurt bark loaded with fruit, nuts, and dark chocolate — only 60 cals per piece!
instructions: Spread Greek yoghurt evenly on a parchment-lined baking tray.
Drizzle with sugar-free maple syrup.
Top with sliced strawberries, raspberries, sliced banana, peanuts, and chopped dark chocolate.
Freeze for at least 2 hours until solid.
Break into 8 pieces and serve straight from the freezer.

pt.title: Bark de Iogurte e Framboesa
pt.description: Um bark gelado de iogurte com fruta, frutos secos e chocolate negro — apenas 60 calorias por pedaço!
instructions: Spread Greek yoghurt evenly on a parchment-lined baking tray.
Drizzle with sugar-free maple syrup.
Top with sliced strawberries, raspberries, sliced banana, peanuts, and chopped dark chocolate.
Freeze for at least 2 hours until solid.
Break into 8 pieces and serve straight from the freezer.

en.title: Zero Carb Buffalo Ranch Pizza
en.description: A zero-carb pizza with a chicken breast crust, buffalo ranch sauce, bacon, and melty cheese.
ingredients: 1 tbsp Frank's Red Hot Buffalo sauce
instructions: Season ground chicken with parmesan, buffalo sauce, onion powder, garlic powder, paprika, and salt. Mix well.
Spread the mixture thin in a circular pizza shape on a parchment-lined air fryer rack.
Air fry at 450°F (230°C) for 12–15 minutes, or until edges start to brown.
While the crust cooks, cook the bacon and set aside.
Make the ranch sauce: combine Greek yogurt, mayo, lemon juice, chives, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Remove crust from air fryer. Spread ranch sauce on top, add cheeses and bacon bits.
Air fry for 8–10 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
(Optional) Broil on high for 2–5 minutes for extra crispiness.

pt.title: Pizza Zero Hidratos com Frango e Molho Ranch
pt.description: Uma pizza sem hidratos com base de peito de frango, molho ranch buffalo, bacon e queijo derretido.
ingredients: 1 tbsp Frank's Red Hot Buffalo sauce
instructions: Season ground chicken with parmesan, buffalo sauce, onion powder, garlic powder, paprika, and salt. Mix well.
Spread the mixture thin in a circular pizza shape on a parchment-lined air fryer rack.
Air fry at 450°F (230°C) for 12–15 minutes, or until edges start to brown.
While the crust cooks, cook the bacon and set aside.
Make the ranch sauce: combine Greek yogurt, mayo, lemon juice, chives, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Remove crust from air fryer. Spread ranch sauce on top, add cheeses and bacon bits.
Air fry for 8–10 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
(Optional) Broil on high for 2–5 minutes for extra crispiness.

en.title: Boiled Egg Mayonnaise
en.description: A high-protein, low-carb mayonnaise made from boiled eggs and Dijon mustard — creamy and tangy.
instructions: Boil eggs, peel, and let cool.
Add eggs, Dijon mustard, apple cider vinegar, and salt to a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Store in the fridge for up to 5 days.

pt.title: Maionese de Ovos Cozidos
pt.description: Uma maionese rica em proteína e baixa em hidratos, feita com ovos cozidos e mostarda Dijon — cremosa e saborosa.
instructions: Boil eggs, peel, and let cool.
Add eggs, Dijon mustard, apple cider vinegar, and salt to a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Store in the fridge for up to 5 days.

en.title: Banana Candy
en.description: Traditional Brazilian banana candy (bananinha) — sweet, chewy, and made with simple ingredients.
instructions: Mash the bananas and place in a large pot.
Add sugar, cocoa powder, and lemon juice.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and pulls away from the pot.
Pour onto a greased surface or parchment paper.
Let cool and cut into pieces.

pt.title: Bananinha
pt.description: Traditional Brazilian banana candy (bananinha) — sweet, chewy, and made with simple ingredients.
instructions: Mash the bananas and place in a large pot.
Add sugar, cocoa powder, and lemon juice.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and pulls away from the pot.
Pour onto a greased surface or parchment paper.
Let cool and cut into pieces.

en.title: Healthy Banana Chocolate
en.description: Healthy banana chocolates — super easy to make with just 4 ingredients!
ingredients: 2 tbsp cocoa powder or chocolate drink mix (cacau em pó ou achocolatado)
instructions: Mash the bananas and mix with cocoa powder and water.
Shape the mixture into small bars or bite-sized pieces.
Freeze until firm.
Melt the coating chocolate.
Dip the frozen banana pieces in melted chocolate.
Return to the fridge/freezer to set.

pt.title: Chocolate de Banana Saudável
pt.description: Healthy banana chocolates — super easy to make with just 4 ingredients!
ingredients: 2 tbsp cocoa powder or chocolate drink mix (cacau em pó ou achocolatado)
instructions: Mash the bananas and mix with cocoa powder and water.
Shape the mixture into small bars or bite-sized pieces.
Freeze until firm.
Melt the coating chocolate.
Dip the frozen banana pieces in melted chocolate.
Return to the fridge/freezer to set.

en.title: Cloud Cream Cheese Greek Yoghurt Overnight
en.description: Pure Greek yoghurt transformed into a tangy, salty cream cheese — no thickeners or fillers needed.
instructions: Mix the Greek yoghurt with lemon juice and salt.
Place in a cheesecloth or fine strainer over a bowl.
Refrigerate overnight to strain out excess whey.
The next morning, enjoy a thick, tangy cream cheese on your favourite bagel.

pt.title: Cream Cheese de Iogurte Grego
pt.description: Iogurte grego transformado num cream cheese ácido e salgado — sem espessantes nem aditivos.
instructions: Mix the Greek yoghurt with lemon juice and salt.
Place in a cheesecloth or fine strainer over a bowl.
Refrigerate overnight to strain out excess whey.
The next morning, enjoy a thick, tangy cream cheese on your favourite bagel.

en.title: Cabbage Hamburger
en.description: A creative low-carb hamburger using cabbage as the bun — simple and satisfying!
instructions: Mix 120g shredded cabbage with 1 egg, salt, and pepper.
Season ground beef with salt and pepper.
Cook both the cabbage mixture and beef patty in round shapes in a pan.
Make the sauce by combining rakkyo, ketchup, and mustard.
Assemble: cabbage bun, beef patty, sauce, cabbage bun.
Your cabbage hamburger is done! 🍔

pt.title: Hambúrguer de Couve
pt.description: Um hambúrguer criativo e baixo em hidratos que usa couve como pão — simples e saciante!
instructions: Mix 120g shredded cabbage with 1 egg, salt, and pepper.
Season ground beef with salt and pepper.
Cook both the cabbage mixture and beef patty in round shapes in a pan.
Make the sauce by combining rakkyo, ketchup, and mustard.
Assemble: cabbage bun, beef patty, sauce, cabbage bun.
Your cabbage hamburger is done! 🍔

en.title: High-Protein Chocolate Pudding
en.description: A surprisingly delicious high-protein chocolate pudding made from boiled eggs — 24g protein per serving.
instructions: Hard boil 5 eggs for 8½ minutes. Peel and let cool slightly.
Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until completely smooth.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour (longer is better) to allow it to set.
Chilling also removes any eggy smell or taste.

pt.title: Pudim de Chocolate Proteico
pt.description: Um pudim de chocolate rico em proteína feito com ovos cozidos — surpreendentemente delicioso, 24g de proteína por dose.
instructions: Hard boil 5 eggs for 8½ minutes. Peel and let cool slightly.
Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until completely smooth.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour (longer is better) to allow it to set.
Chilling also removes any eggy smell or taste.

en.title: High-Protein Chocolate Protein Fluff
en.description: A massive, filling bowl of chocolate protein fluff — only 182 calories with 22g of protein!
instructions: Add all ingredients to a food processor.
Blend on high for about 5 minutes until no clumps remain and the mixture has tripled in volume.
Serve immediately.
Optionally top with your favourite crushed cereal.

pt.title: Mousse Proteica de Chocolate
pt.description: Uma tigela enorme de mousse proteica de chocolate — apenas 182 calorias com 22g de proteína!
instructions: Add all ingredients to a food processor.
Blend on high for about 5 minutes until no clumps remain and the mixture has tripled in volume.
Serve immediately.
Optionally top with your favourite crushed cereal.

en.title: High-Protein Cabbage Lasagna
en.description: A low-carb, high-protein lasagna using cabbage leaves instead of pasta — rich, cheesy, and satisfying.
ingredients: 1 large green cabbage, cored and halved
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add cabbage halves and cook 10–15 minutes. Remove softened leaves with tongs and pat dry.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet. Sauté onion 2–3 minutes, add garlic for 30 seconds.
Add ground beef, cook 8–10 minutes until browned. Drain fat.
Stir in crushed tomatoes, Italian seasoning, basil, salt, pepper, and sugar. Simmer 5 minutes.
Mix ricotta, blended cottage cheese, and egg until smooth.
Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Spread a thin layer of meat sauce in a 9×13-inch baking dish.
Layer: cabbage leaves → cheese filling → meat sauce. Repeat until you run out, ending with meat sauce.
Top with mozzarella and parmesan.
Bake uncovered for 40–45 minutes. Broil 2–3 minutes to brown the cheese.
Rest 10–15 minutes before slicing. Garnish with fresh basil.

pt.title: Lasanha de Couve
pt.description: Uma lasanha baixa em hidratos e rica em proteína que usa folhas de couve em vez de massa — rica, com queijo e saciante.
ingredients: 1 large green cabbage, cored and halved
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add cabbage halves and cook 10–15 minutes. Remove softened leaves with tongs and pat dry.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet. Sauté onion 2–3 minutes, add garlic for 30 seconds.
Add ground beef, cook 8–10 minutes until browned. Drain fat.
Stir in crushed tomatoes, Italian seasoning, basil, salt, pepper, and sugar. Simmer 5 minutes.
Mix ricotta, blended cottage cheese, and egg until smooth.
Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Spread a thin layer of meat sauce in a 9×13-inch baking dish.
Layer: cabbage leaves → cheese filling → meat sauce. Repeat until you run out, ending with meat sauce.
Top with mozzarella and parmesan.
Bake uncovered for 40–45 minutes. Broil 2–3 minutes to brown the cheese.
Rest 10–15 minutes before slicing. Garnish with fresh basil.

en.title: Vegan Chocolate Flan
en.description: A rich, creamy vegan chocolate flan — free from flour, eggs, dairy, and starch. Indulgent yet guilt-free.
ingredients: 1 cup soaked chickpeas (from ~½ cup dried, soaked overnight)
¼ cup maple syrup (or sweetener of choice)
instructions: Rinse and drain the soaked chickpeas well.
Blend 1 cup chickpeas with 3 cups water and a pinch of salt until very smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine sieve to obtain smooth chickpea milk.
Add maple syrup, oil, and cocoa powder to the chickpea milk. Mix well.
Heat on low to medium, stirring constantly.
Once it simmers, continue cooking ~10 minutes until it thickens to a custard-like texture.
Pour into a mould and refrigerate for at least 3 hours until fully set.
Before serving, dust with cocoa powder and drizzle maple syrup if desired.

pt.title: Flan de Chocolate Vegano
pt.description: Um flan de chocolate vegano cremoso — sem farinha, ovos, lacticínios ou amido. Indulgente mas sem culpa.
ingredients: 1 cup soaked chickpeas (from ~½ cup dried, soaked overnight)
¼ cup maple syrup (or sweetener of choice)
instructions: Rinse and drain the soaked chickpeas well.
Blend 1 cup chickpeas with 3 cups water and a pinch of salt until very smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine sieve to obtain smooth chickpea milk.
Add maple syrup, oil, and cocoa powder to the chickpea milk. Mix well.
Heat on low to medium, stirring constantly.
Once it simmers, continue cooking ~10 minutes until it thickens to a custard-like texture.
Pour into a mould and refrigerate for at least 3 hours until fully set.
Before serving, dust with cocoa powder and drizzle maple syrup if desired.

en.title: 3-Ingredient Protein Cookies
en.description: Crispy outside, gooey inside — no added sugar cookies made in just 10 minutes with 3 simple ingredients!
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Mash the banana, then fold in the peanut butter and protein powder.
Let the dough sit for 1–2 minutes, then mix again (the protein thickens it).
Scoop 6 cookies onto a parchment-lined baking sheet. The dough will be sticky — shape into circles.
Top with chocolate chips if desired. Press down lightly with a fork to form discs.
Bake 10–12 minutes until edges are golden and centre is no longer wet.
Top with sea salt and let cool 5 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
Enjoy immediately for best results — they soften after storing.

pt.title: Bolachas Proteicas de 3 Ingredientes
pt.description: Crocantes por fora, macias por dentro — bolachas sem açúcar adicionado feitas em 10 minutos com apenas 3 ingredientes!
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Mash the banana, then fold in the peanut butter and protein powder.
Let the dough sit for 1–2 minutes, then mix again (the protein thickens it).
Scoop 6 cookies onto a parchment-lined baking sheet. The dough will be sticky — shape into circles.
Top with chocolate chips if desired. Press down lightly with a fork to form discs.
Bake 10–12 minutes until edges are golden and centre is no longer wet.
Top with sea salt and let cool 5 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
Enjoy immediately for best results — they soften after storing.

en.title: Protein Cookie Dough Bark
en.description: A no-bake freezer dessert — cookie dough base topped with dark chocolate. Low effort, high reward!
ingredients: 2-4 tbsp milk of choice (as needed for texture)
instructions: In a bowl, mix maple syrup, almond butter, and vanilla until smooth.
Add almond flour, protein powder and salt and mix until a soft dough forms. Add 1 tbsp milk at a time if needed until desired consistency is reached.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and press the dough into an even layer (about 1/4–1/2 inch thick). Pop it in the freezer while you melt the chocolate.
Microwave chocolate chips with coconut oil in 20–30 second intervals, stirring until smooth.
Pour melted chocolate over the cookie dough layer and spread evenly.
Place in the freezer for 1–2 hours, or until fully set.
Remove and break into bark-style pieces with your hands or a knife. Enjoy!

pt.title: Bark de Massa de Cookie Proteica
pt.description: Uma sobremesa de congelador sem forno — base de massa de cookie coberta com chocolate negro. Pouco esforço, grande resultado!
ingredients: 2-4 tbsp milk of choice (as needed for texture)
instructions: In a bowl, mix maple syrup, almond butter, and vanilla until smooth.
Add almond flour, protein powder and salt and mix until a soft dough forms. Add 1 tbsp milk at a time if needed until desired consistency is reached.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and press the dough into an even layer (about 1/4–1/2 inch thick). Pop it in the freezer while you melt the chocolate.
Microwave chocolate chips with coconut oil in 20–30 second intervals, stirring until smooth.
Pour melted chocolate over the cookie dough layer and spread evenly.
Place in the freezer for 1–2 hours, or until fully set.
Remove and break into bark-style pieces with your hands or a knife. Enjoy!

en.title: Microwave Cookie Dough
en.description: A quick single-serve microwave cookie dough — cookie taste with cookie dough texture, naturally high in protein!
instructions: Mix the wet ingredients together in a microwave-safe bowl.
Add in the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
Sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
Microwave for 1 min 20 sec, or until cooked through.
Enjoy!

pt.title: Massa de Cookie no Micro-ondas
pt.description: Uma massa de cookie individual feita no micro-ondas — sabor a bolacha com textura de massa crua, naturalmente rica em proteína!
instructions: Mix the wet ingredients together in a microwave-safe bowl.
Add in the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
Sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
Microwave for 1 min 20 sec, or until cooked through.
Enjoy!

en.title: Protein Brookies (Cookie + Brownie)
en.description: A high-protein brownie-cookie hybrid — 88 mini pieces at only 9 calories each! Low-calorie, macro-friendly dessert.
ingredients: 85g (1/4 cup + 2 tbsp) plain or vanilla nonfat Greek yogurt
1 scoop chocolate or vanilla protein powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
In one bowl, combine all cookie wet ingredients and mix until smooth. In a separate bowl, combine all cookie dry ingredients, then mix wet and dry together. Add chocolate chip mix-ins.
In another bowl, combine all brownie wet ingredients and mix. In a separate bowl, mix all brownie dry ingredients, then combine wet and dry.
Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper and lightly coat with cooking spray.
Spread the brownie batter evenly on the sheet.
Drop spoonfuls of the cookie dough on top of the brownie layer.
Add extra chocolate chips or toppings if desired.
Bake at 350°F for 15–20 minutes, or until edges are set but centre is slightly soft (toothpick should come out clean).
Remove from oven and allow to cool completely so it firms up.
Once cooled, slice into 88 pieces or desired size. Enjoy!

pt.title: Brookies Proteicos (Cookie + Brownie)
pt.description: Um híbrido de brownie e cookie rico em proteína — 88 mini pedaços com apenas 9 calorias cada! Sobremesa de baixas calorias.
ingredients: 85g (1/4 cup + 2 tbsp) plain or vanilla nonfat Greek yogurt
1 scoop chocolate or vanilla protein powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
In one bowl, combine all cookie wet ingredients and mix until smooth. In a separate bowl, combine all cookie dry ingredients, then mix wet and dry together. Add chocolate chip mix-ins.
In another bowl, combine all brownie wet ingredients and mix. In a separate bowl, mix all brownie dry ingredients, then combine wet and dry.
Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper and lightly coat with cooking spray.
Spread the brownie batter evenly on the sheet.
Drop spoonfuls of the cookie dough on top of the brownie layer.
Add extra chocolate chips or toppings if desired.
Bake at 350°F for 15–20 minutes, or until edges are set but centre is slightly soft (toothpick should come out clean).
Remove from oven and allow to cool completely so it firms up.
Once cooled, slice into 88 pieces or desired size. Enjoy!

en.title: Flourless Peanut Butter Banana Chocolate Chip Bars
en.description: Flourless peanut butter banana bars with chocolate chips — only 5 min prep, one bowl, and naturally gluten-free!
ingredients: 1 cup (258g) natural peanut butter, room temp
1/2 cup (90g) chocolate chips (plus more for garnish)
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Line an 8×8" brownie pan with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, mash the bananas.
Add peanut butter, almond flour, maple syrup, egg, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt. Mix until just combined.
Fold in the chocolate chips.
Transfer batter to pan and top with more chips.
Bake for around 25 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Allow to fully cool prior to slicing (ideally let them sit overnight for best texture).

pt.title: Barras de Banana e Manteiga de Amendoim sem Farinha
pt.description: Barras de banana e manteiga de amendoim com pepitas de chocolate — 5 min de preparação, uma tigela, e naturalmente sem glúten!
ingredients: 1 cup (258g) natural peanut butter, room temp
1/2 cup (90g) chocolate chips (plus more for garnish)
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Line an 8×8" brownie pan with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, mash the bananas.
Add peanut butter, almond flour, maple syrup, egg, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt. Mix until just combined.
Fold in the chocolate chips.
Transfer batter to pan and top with more chips.
Bake for around 25 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Allow to fully cool prior to slicing (ideally let them sit overnight for best texture).

en.title: Portuguese Egg Custard (Doce de Ovos)
en.description: Receita tradicional portuguesa de doce de ovos — usado para rechear hóstias, ovos moles de Aveiro, bolos de aniversário, natas do céu e muito mais.
ingredients: 18 gemas de ovo (tamanho L ou XL)
instructions: Juntar o açúcar com a água num tacho de cobre ou inox e levar ao lume a ferver até atingir ponto pérola (108-109ºC).
Passar as gemas por um peneiro de rede fina para uma tigela seca e limpa.
Retirar a calda do lume e adicionar dois terços da calda aos poucos na gema deslaçada, mexendo sempre com umas varas até envolver bem.
Virar as gemas com a calda para o tacho onde ficou um terço da calda, mexendo sempre.
Levar novamente a lume médio, mexendo sempre com as varas, ao redor e no meio, até engrossar.
Retirar o tacho do lume, virar o doce para um tabuleiro, espalhar bem, tapar com uma folha de papel vegetal ou película aderente diretamente no doce e deixar arrefecer.
Reservar em local seco e fresco, bem tapado.

pt.title: Doce de Ovos
pt.description: Receita tradicional portuguesa de doce de ovos — usado para rechear hóstias, ovos moles de Aveiro, bolos de aniversário, natas do céu e muito mais.
ingredients: 18 gemas de ovo (tamanho L ou XL)
instructions: Juntar o açúcar com a água num tacho de cobre ou inox e levar ao lume a ferver até atingir ponto pérola (108-109ºC).
Passar as gemas por um peneiro de rede fina para uma tigela seca e limpa.
Retirar a calda do lume e adicionar dois terços da calda aos poucos na gema deslaçada, mexendo sempre com umas varas até envolver bem.
Virar as gemas com a calda para o tacho onde ficou um terço da calda, mexendo sempre.
Levar novamente a lume médio, mexendo sempre com as varas, ao redor e no meio, até engrossar.
Retirar o tacho do lume, virar o doce para um tabuleiro, espalhar bem, tapar com uma folha de papel vegetal ou película aderente diretamente no doce e deixar arrefecer.
Reservar em local seco e fresco, bem tapado.

en.title: Neutral Glaze (Nappage)
en.description: Geleia de brilho neutro — usada para proteger e dar acabamento brilhante a tartes de fruta, semifrios e bolos com creme. Duas versões: profissional (pectina NH) e caseira (gelatina).
ingredients: 50 gr açúcar (para misturar com a pectina)
5 gr sumo de limão (ou ácido cítrico diluído)
instructions: --- Versão Profissional (Pectina NH) ---
Mistura seca: juntar a pectina NH com os 50g de açúcar (para evitar grumos).
Aquecer a água + glucose + 200g de açúcar até aos 60°C.
Adicionar a mistura de pectina + açúcar, mexendo bem com vara de arames.
Levar a ferver durante cerca de 1 a 2 minutos (é importante ferver para ativar a pectina NH).
Retirar do lume e acrescentar o sumo de limão.
Arrefecer e guardar no frio, coberto, até usar. Quando for usar, aquecer ligeiramente até cerca de 40–45°C para ficar fluida.
--- Versão Caseira (Gelatina) ---
Hidratar as folhas de gelatina em água fria.
Levar ao lume a água + açúcar + glucose até ferver.
Desligar o lume e juntar o sumo de limão.
Incorporar a gelatina escorrida, mexendo até dissolver completamente.
Deixar arrefecer até cerca de 40°C antes de aplicar.

pt.title: Geleia de Brilho Neutro
pt.description: Geleia de brilho neutro — usada para proteger e dar acabamento brilhante a tartes de fruta, semifrios e bolos com creme. Duas versões: profissional (pectina NH) e caseira (gelatina).
ingredients: 50 gr açúcar (para misturar com a pectina)
5 gr sumo de limão (ou ácido cítrico diluído)
instructions: --- Versão Profissional (Pectina NH) ---
Mistura seca: juntar a pectina NH com os 50g de açúcar (para evitar grumos).
Aquecer a água + glucose + 200g de açúcar até aos 60°C.
Adicionar a mistura de pectina + açúcar, mexendo bem com vara de arames.
Levar a ferver durante cerca de 1 a 2 minutos (é importante ferver para ativar a pectina NH).
Retirar do lume e acrescentar o sumo de limão.
Arrefecer e guardar no frio, coberto, até usar. Quando for usar, aquecer ligeiramente até cerca de 40–45°C para ficar fluida.
--- Versão Caseira (Gelatina) ---
Hidratar as folhas de gelatina em água fria.
Levar ao lume a água + açúcar + glucose até ferver.
Desligar o lume e juntar o sumo de limão.
Incorporar a gelatina escorrida, mexendo até dissolver completamente.
Deixar arrefecer até cerca de 40°C antes de aplicar.

en.title: Simple Birthday Cake (Pão de Ló + Doce de Ovos)
en.description: Bolo de aniversário tradicional português — pão de ló fofo, recheado e coberto com doce de ovos, decorado com amêndoa laminada torrada.
ingredients: 1 colher (de chá) de aroma de baunilha
instructions: --- Pão de Ló ---
Juntar os ovos com o açúcar e a raspa de limão e bater até obter um creme fofo e esbranquiçado.
Peneirar a farinha diretamente no batido e envolver delicadamente até ficar uniforme.
Untar uma forma com desmoldante ou manteiga, verter o batido na forma e alisar a superfície.
Cozer no forno pré-aquecido a 180°C, durante aproximadamente 20 minutos.
Verificar a cozedura com o teste do palito, retirar do forno, desenformar e deixar arrefecer totalmente. Cobrir com película aderente e levar ao frio pelo menos 2 horas.
--- Doce de Ovos ---
Num tacho de cobre ou inox, juntar o açúcar com a água e levar a ferver até atingir ponto pérola (108-109ºC).
Passar as gemas por um peneiro de rede fina para um recipiente grande, seco e limpo.
Retirar a calda do lume e adicionar dois terços da calda em fio na gema deslaçada, mexendo sempre com umas varas.
Virar as gemas com a calda para o tacho onde ficou um terço da calda, mexendo sempre.
Levar novamente a lume médio, mexendo sempre, ao redor e no meio, até atingir ponto de estrada. Retirar e deixar arrefecer.
--- Calda de Açúcar ---
Juntar todos os ingredientes num tacho, levar ao lume a ferver 2 minutos, retirar do lume e deixar arrefecer.
--- Montagem e Decoração ---
Espalhar amêndoa laminada num tabuleiro forrado com papel e levar ao forno a 200ºC até dourar. Deixar arrefecer.
Cortar o pão de ló em duas camadas com uma faca de serra e humedecer com a calda de açúcar aromatizada com canela.
Colocar uma camada de pão de ló num prato, rechear com doce de ovos e dispor a segunda camada por cima.
Cobrir o bolo com doce de ovos e alisar a superfície com uma espátula.
Espalhar um pouco de geleia de brilho neutro por cima para dar brilho e proteger o doce de ovos.
Cobrir as laterais do bolo com a amêndoa laminada torrada.
Decorar a gosto com fruta fresca, chocolates ou rosas de açúcar.

pt.title: Bolo de Aniversário Simples
pt.description: Bolo de aniversário tradicional português — pão de ló fofo, recheado e coberto com doce de ovos, decorado com amêndoa laminada torrada.
ingredients: 1 colher (de chá) de aroma de baunilha
instructions: --- Pão de Ló ---
Juntar os ovos com o açúcar e a raspa de limão e bater até obter um creme fofo e esbranquiçado.
Peneirar a farinha diretamente no batido e envolver delicadamente até ficar uniforme.
Untar uma forma com desmoldante ou manteiga, verter o batido na forma e alisar a superfície.
Cozer no forno pré-aquecido a 180°C, durante aproximadamente 20 minutos.
Verificar a cozedura com o teste do palito, retirar do forno, desenformar e deixar arrefecer totalmente. Cobrir com película aderente e levar ao frio pelo menos 2 horas.
--- Doce de Ovos ---

Passar as gemas por um peneiro de rede fina para um recipiente grande, seco e limpo.
Retirar a calda do lume e adicionar dois terços da calda em fio na gema deslaçada, mexendo sempre com umas varas.
Virar as gemas com a calda para o tacho onde ficou um terço da calda, mexendo sempre.
Levar novamente a lume médio, mexendo sempre, ao redor e no meio, até atingir ponto de estrada. Retirar e deixar arrefecer.
--- Calda de Açúcar ---
Juntar todos os ingredientes num tacho, levar ao lume a ferver 2 minutos, retirar do lume e deixar arrefecer.
--- Montagem e Decoração ---
Espalhar amêndoa laminada num tabuleiro forrado com papel e levar ao forno a 200ºC até dourar. Deixar arrefecer.
Cortar o pão de ló em duas camadas com uma faca de serra e humedecer com a calda de açúcar aromatizada com canela.
Colocar uma camada de pão de ló num prato, rechear com doce de ovos e dispor a segunda camada por cima.
Cobrir o bolo com doce de ovos e alisar a superfície com uma espátula.
Espalhar um pouco de geleia de brilho neutro por cima para dar brilho e proteger o doce de ovos.
Cobrir as laterais do bolo com a amêndoa laminada torrada.
Decorar a gosto com fruta fresca, chocolates ou rosas de açúcar.

en.title: Water Brownie
en.description: Water Brownie — no butter or added fat. Egg-free and dairy-free, yet moist and delicious. Simple, budget-friendly Italian-style brownie. Approximately 90 kcal per square (135 kcal with dark chocolate).

nutrition.note: 90 kcal por quadrado (135 kcal com chocolate preto opcional)

ingredients: 50 g de farinha de trigo sem fermento
50 g de cacau magro em pó
80 g de eritritol com stévia (ou açúcar, mel ou adoçar a gosto)
1 c. chá de fermento para bolos
Nota: se usar mel ou adoçante líquido, misture-o na água quente antes de verter na mistura de secos. A quantidade de água varia conforme o adoçante.
instructions: Preparação: ver comentários no post para o método completo (mix dos secos, adicionar água morna até obter consistência desejada e cozer/assar em airfryer conforme comentário).

pt.title: Brownie de Água
pt.description: Brownie de Água, sem manteiga ou outra gordura adicionada. Sem ovos, sem leite, mas húmido e delicioso — receita simples e económica.

nutrition.note: 90 kcal por quadrado (135 kcal com chocolate preto opcional)

ingredients: 50 g de farinha de trigo sem fermento
50 g de cacau magro em pó
80 g de eritritol com stévia (ou açúcar, mel ou adoçar a gosto)
1 c. chá de fermento para bolos
Nota: se usar mel ou adoçante líquido, misture-o na água quente antes de verter na mistura de secos. A quantidade de água varia conforme o adoçante.
instructions: Preparação: ver comentários no post para o método completo (mix dos secos, adicionar água morna até obter consistência desejada e cozer/assar em airfryer conforme comentário).

en.title: Diet Condensed Milk
en.description: Yes — it's possible to make condensed milk without sugar. Process: 1 cup full-fat milk powder; 1/2 cup water; 1/2 tsp liquid xylitol or 2 tbsp powdered xylitol. Process for a long time until smooth and homogeneous. Adjust milk powder or water if too thin or too thick. Check with your doctor for recommended amounts — xylitol has ~40% fewer calories than sugar but still contains calories and must be metabolized.
ingredients: 1 xícara de chá de leite em pó integral (1 cup full-fat milk powder)
1/2 xícara de chá de água (1/2 cup water)
1/2 colher de chá de xilitol líquido ou 2 colheres de sopa de xilitol em pó (1/2 tsp liquid xylitol or 2 tbsp powdered xylitol)
instructions: Colocar todos os ingredientes no processador ou liquidificador.
Processar por bastante tempo até obter uma consistência lisa e homogénea.
Se ficar muito líquido, adicionar mais leite em pó; se ficar muito espesso, adicionar um pouco de água e processar novamente.
Ajustar a doçura ao gosto; lembre-se que xilitol tem calorias e deve ser consumido com moderação.
Consulte o seu médico ou nutricionista para orientações específicas sobre quantidades, especialmente se tiver condições médicas que exijam controlo glicémico.

pt.title: Leite condensado diet
pt.description: Sim, é possível consumir leite condensado sem consumir açúcar. Basta processar: 1 xícara de chá de leite em pó integral; 1/2 xícara de chá de água; 1/2 colher de chá de xilitol líquido ou 2 colheres de sopa de xilitol em pó. Processe por muito tempo até adquirir uma consistência lisa e homogênea. Corrija a quantidade de leite em pó ou de água caso fique muito líquido ou muito espesso. Pergunte ao seu médico quais as quantidades recomendadas para as suas necessidades já que xilitol tem 40% menos calorias que o açúcar, mas ainda assim tem calorias e tem baixíssimo índice glicémico porém, também precisa ser metabolizado.
ingredients: 1 xícara de chá de leite em pó integral (1 cup full-fat milk powder)
1/2 xícara de chá de água (1/2 cup water)
1/2 colher de chá de xilitol líquido ou 2 colheres de sopa de xilitol em pó (1/2 tsp liquid xylitol or 2 tbsp powdered xylitol)
instructions: Colocar todos os ingredientes no processador ou liquidificador.
Processar por bastante tempo até obter uma consistência lisa e homogénea.
Se ficar muito líquido, adicionar mais leite em pó; se ficar muito espesso, adicionar um pouco de água e processar novamente.
Ajustar a doçura ao gosto; lembre-se que xilitol tem calorias e deve ser consumido com moderação.
Consulte o seu médico ou nutricionista para orientações específicas sobre quantidades, especialmente se tiver condições médicas que exijam controlo glicémico.

en.title: Peach & Banana Nice Cream (about 1 pint)
en.description: Cost $4.50 to make for about a pint of homemade 'ice cream' — perfect for breakfast. Tip: frozen bananas make it richer and creamier; omit for a lighter sorbet-style treat.
ingredients: 1 frozen banana (1 banana congelada) — optional for creaminess
1/3 cup Greek yogurt (1/3 chávena de iogurte grego)
1/4–1/2 cup maple syrup or honey (1/4–1/2 chávena de xarope de ácer ou mel)
instructions: Add the frozen fruit to the bowl of a food processor.
Pulse until the fruit is finely chopped and starts to look crumbly.
Add the Greek yogurt and maple syrup (or honey).
Blend on high until the mixture is perfectly smooth and creamy, scraping down the sides as needed.
Serve immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 30–60 minutes for a firmer scoop.
Variation: omit the banana for a lighter sorbet; include extra banana for an ultra-creamy texture.
Tip: this works well with most frozen fruits — try mango, berries, or mixed fruit.

pt.title: Gelado de Pêssego e Banana
pt.description: Custa cerca de $4.50 para fazer ~1 pint de ‘gelado’ caseiro e é ótimo para pequeno-almoço. Dica: use banana congelada para textura mais cremosa; para um estilo sorbet, omita a banana.
ingredients: 1 frozen banana (1 banana congelada) — optional for creaminess
1/3 cup Greek yogurt (1/3 chávena de iogurte grego)
1/4–1/2 cup maple syrup or honey (1/4–1/2 chávena de xarope de ácer ou mel)
instructions: Add the frozen fruit to the bowl of a food processor.
Pulse until the fruit is finely chopped and starts to look crumbly.
Add the Greek yogurt and maple syrup (or honey).
Blend on high until the mixture is perfectly smooth and creamy, scraping down the sides as needed.
Serve immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 30–60 minutes for a firmer scoop.
Variation: omit the banana for a lighter sorbet; include extra banana for an ultra-creamy texture.
Tip: this works well with most frozen fruits — try mango, berries, or mixed fruit.

en.title: Playdough (Kitchen Ingredients)
en.description: Low-cost, long-lasting playdough made from common kitchen ingredients — stores up to 6 months if kept airtight.
ingredients: ~1 cup hot water (add gradually until dough reaches smooth, non-sticky consistency)
instructions: In a bowl, mix flour, salt, baking soda, oil and food colouring.
Add the hot water a little at a time until the dough is smooth and no longer sticky (often less than 1 cup).
Knead briefly until uniform. Store wrapped in plastic film inside an airtight container at room temperature — lasts up to 6 months.

pt.title: Massinha de Modelar
pt.description: Diversão garantida com baixo custo usando ingredientes de cozinha — conserva até 6 meses se guardada hermeticamente.
ingredients: 1 xícara de água quente (vá adicionando aos poucos até atingir ponto)
instructions: Numa vasilha, junte a farinha, o sal, o bicarbonato, o óleo e o corante.
Vá adicionando a água quente aos poucos até a massinha ficar lisa e deixar de grudar nas mãos (costuma ser necessário menos de 1 xícara).
Guarde envolta em plástico filme dentro de um pote hermético — em temperatura ambiente dura até 6 meses.

en.title: Chocolate Banana Pudding (Baby-friendly)
en.description: A creamy chocolate pudding made from ripe bananas and coconut milk — simple, baby-friendly dessert.
instructions: In a saucepan, combine mashed bananas, coconut milk and cocoa powder.
Stir over medium heat until the mixture thickens (about 10–15 minutes).
Pour into a small mould and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
Tip: the riper the bananas, the sweeter and tastier the pudding will be.

pt.title: Pudim de Chocolate (amigável para bebés)
pt.description: Pudim cremoso de chocolate feito com bananas maduras e leite de coco — simples e ideal para bebés.
ingredients: 4 colheres de sopa de leite de coco
instructions: Numa panela, coloque as bananas amassadas, o leite de coco e o cacau.
Mexa em fogo médio até engrossar (cerca de 10–15 minutos).
Coloque na forminha e leve à geladeira por 1 hora antes de servir.
🍌 Quanto mais maduras as bananas, mais saboroso ficará!

en.title: Chocolate Protein Bites
en.description: Protein-rich chocolate bites made from milk powder and whey — yield ~6 units. See source video for exact shaping and finishing.
instructions: Combine the dry ingredients until evenly mixed.
Form into 6 portions (balls or bites) as shown in the source reel.
Store chilled. Refer to the video for precise technique and optional binders or liquids.

pt.title: Bolinhas de Proteína de Chocolate
pt.description: Bolinhas ricas em proteína feitas com leite em pó e whey — rendimento ~6 unidades. Ver o vídeo para moldar e acabamento.
instructions: Misture os ingredientes secos até homogeneizar.
Modele em 6 porções (bolinhas ou pedaços) conforme mostrado no reel.
Conserve refrigerado. Consulte o vídeo para técnica e líquidos opcionais.

en.title: Coconut Pudding Balls
en.description: Coconut milk pudding that's set, cooled and rolled in desiccated coconut — soft, sweet and great for snacks.
ingredients: 100 g desiccated coconut (reserve a little for rolling)
4 tbsp culinary sweetener (oven/stove-safe, or substitute with preferred sweetener)
instructions: In a saucepan, mix coconut milk, desiccated coconut, corn starch and sweetener.
Cook over low heat, stirring continuously, until mixture thickens and pulls away from the pan.
Transfer to a container and let cool, then refrigerate at least 1 hour.
Shape into balls or desired forms and roll in the reserved desiccated coconut to finish.

pt.title: Beijinhos de Coco (Leite de Coco)
pt.description: Mistura de leite de coco e coco ralado cozida até engrossar, moldada em bolinhas e passada no coco — deliciosa e prática.
ingredients: 100 g de coco ralado (reserve um pouco para enrolar)
4 colheres de adoçante culinário (forno e fogão ou outro de sua preferência)
instructions: Numa panela, misture o leite de coco, o coco ralado, o amido de milho e o adoçante.
Leve ao fogo baixo, mexendo sempre, até a mistura engrossar e desgrudar do fundo da panela.
Transfira para um recipiente, deixe arrefecer e leve à geladeira por pelo menos 1 hora.
Modele em bolinhas ou no formato desejado e passe no coco ralado reservado.

en.title: Strawberry, Mint & Lime Sorbet
en.description: A bright sorbet of frozen strawberries, lime and mint — quick to blend and perfect as popsicles or a frozen treat.
instructions: Blend all ingredients in a high-speed blender until smooth and thick.
Store in a freezer-safe container or pour into popsicle moulds to make popsicles.
Serve straight from the freezer or let soften slightly for scoopable texture.

pt.title: Sorvete de Morango, Hortelã e Lima
pt.description: Um sorvete vibrante de morango, lima e hortelã — fácil de bater e ótimo em formas de picolé ou como sobremesa gelada.
instructions: Coloque todos os ingredientes num liquidificador potente e bata até ficar liso e espesso.
Conserve num recipiente próprio para o congelador ou coloque em formas de picolé para fazer picolés.
Sirva diretamente do congelador ou deixe amolecer um pouco para textura de colher.

en.title: Sourdough Burger Bomb
en.description: The perfect burger bomb with sourdough buns, seasoned beef, caramelized onions, and melted sharp cheddar — a delicious homemade burger experience.
instructions: --- Step 1: Prepare the Caramelized Onions ---
Place a skillet over medium-low heat and melt the 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter.
Add the sliced whole onion and a pinch of salt.

Cook the onions slowly, stirring occasionally, for about 15–20 minutes until they turn a deep golden brown, soft, and sweet. Once finished, remove them from the heat and set them aside in a small bowl to cool slightly.
--- Step 2: Prepare the Ground Beef Mixture ---
In a separate skillet over medium heat, add the 1 lb of lean ground beef and the diced whole onion.
Add salt to taste.
Break up the meat with a spoon or spatula as it cooks. Continue cooking until the beef is completely browned and the diced onions are translucent and tender (about 7–10 minutes).

Crucial Step! Pour the cooked beef and onion mixture into a strainer or tilt the pan to drain away all excess grease and liquid. If the filling is too wet, it will tear or make the sourdough dough soggy when you try to seal it. Let it cool slightly before assembling.
--- Step 3: Prep the Cheese ---
Grate your 80g of sharp cheddar cheese. Keep it nearby in a small bowl so it's ready for assembly alongside your meat and onions.
Note: Sourdough burger bun recipe is available in the cookbook mentioned in the original source.

pt.title: Bomba de Hambúrguer de Massa Azeda
pt.description: A bomba de hambúrguer perfeita com pão de massa azeda, carne temperada, cebolas caramelizadas e queijo cheddar derretido — uma experiência de hambúrguer caseiro deliciosa.
ingredients: 2 colheres de sopa de manteiga sem sal
instructions: --- Passo 1: Preparar as Cebolas Caramelizadas ---
Coloque uma frigideira em lume médio-baixo e derreta as 2 colheres de sopa de manteiga sem sal.
Adicione a cebola inteira cortada em rodelas e uma pitada de sal.

Cozinhe as cebolas lentamente, mexendo ocasionalmente, por cerca de 15–20 minutos até ficarem douradas, macias e doces. Depois de prontas, retire do fogo e reserve numa tigela pequena para arrefecer ligeiramente.
--- Passo 2: Preparar a Mistura de Carne Picada ---
Numa frigideira separada em lume médio, adicione 450g de carne picada magra e a cebola cortada em cubos.
Adicione sal a gosto.
Desfaça a carne com uma colher ou espátula enquanto cozinha. Continue a cozinhar até a carne estar completamente dourada e as cebolas ficarem translúcidas e macias (cerca de 7–10 minutos).

Passo Crucial! Despeje a mistura de carne e cebola cozidas numa peneira ou incline a panela para escorrer todo o excesso de gordura e líquido. Se o recheio estiver muito húmido, rasgará ou deixará a massa azeda encharcada quando tentar selar. Deixe arrefecer ligeiramente antes de montar.
--- Passo 3: Preparar o Queijo ---
Rale 80g de queijo cheddar forte. Mantenha-o próximo numa tigela pequena para estar pronto para a montagem juntamente com a carne e as cebolas.
Nota: A receita do pão de hambúrguer de massa azeda está disponível no livro de receitas mencionado na fonte original.

en.title: Lazy Meatball Lasagna
en.description: A simple, one-dish meatball lasagna with frozen meatballs, marinara, pasta, ricotta, and mozzarella — minimal prep, maximum flavor!
instructions: Combine all the ingredients together in a baking dish, reserving some mozzarella for topping.
Cover with foil.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45-50 minutes.
Remove foil and top with remaining mozzarella.
Bake uncovered for 10-15 minutes until cheese is melted and golden.
Enjoy!

pt.title: Lasanha Preguiçosa de Almôndegas
pt.description: Uma lasanha simples de almôndegas num só prato, com almôndegas congeladas, marinara, massa, ricota e mozzarella — preparação mínima, sabor máximo!
ingredients: 2 colheres de chá de tempero italiano
1/2 colher de chá de alho em pó
1/2 colher de chá de cebola em pó
instructions: Combine todos os ingredientes numa assadeira, reservando um pouco de mozzarella para cobrir.
Cubra com papel alumínio.
Asse a 190°C por 45-50 minutos.
Retire o papel alumínio e cubra com a mozzarella restante.
Asse sem cobrir por 10-15 minutos até o queijo derreter e dourar.
Aproveite!

en.title: 2-Ingredient Zucchini Wrap
en.description: A healthy, high-protein wrap made with just zucchini and eggs — looks like bread but has zero flour. Perfect for a light meal or late-night snack!
ingredients: Fillings of your choice (turkey, salami, ham, pepperoni, lettuce, tomatoes, onion, etc.)
instructions: Blend the zucchini in a blender until smooth.
Squeeze out all of the moisture from the zucchini using a cheese cloth or kitchen towel — this is crucial!
Return the squeezed zucchini to the blender, add the eggs, salt, and a drizzle of olive oil. Blend again until well combined.
Heat a large pan over medium heat and lightly grease it.
Pour the batter into the pan like a pancake and spread it thin.
Fry for a couple of minutes on each side until golden and cooked through.
Remove from the pan and let cool slightly.
Fill with your favorite ingredients (turkey, salami, ham, pepperoni, lettuce, tomatoes, onion, etc.) and roll like a wrap or burrito.
Enjoy immediately!

pt.title: Wrap de Abobrinha com 2 Ingredientes
pt.description: Um wrap saudável e rico em proteína feito apenas com abobrinha e ovos — parece pão, mas não tem um grama de farinha. Perfeito para uma refeição leve ou lanche noturno!
ingredients: Recheios da sua escolha (peru, salame, presunto, pepperoni, alface, tomate, cebola, etc.)
instructions: Bata a abobrinha no liquidificador até ficar lisa.
Esprema toda a humidade da abobrinha usando um pano de queijo ou toalha de cozinha — isto é crucial!
Volte a colocar a abobrinha espremida no liquidificador, adicione os ovos, sal e um fio de azeite. Bata novamente até ficar bem combinado.
Aqueça uma frigideira grande em lume médio e unte ligeiramente.
Despeje a massa na frigideira como uma panqueca e espalhe finamente.
Frite por alguns minutos de cada lado até dourar e cozinhar completamente.
Retire da frigideira e deixe arrefecer ligeiramente.
Recheie com os seus ingredientes favoritos (peru, salame, presunto, pepperoni, alface, tomate, cebola, etc.) e enrole como um wrap ou burrito.
Aproveite imediatamente!

en.title: Chicken Crust Pizza
en.description: A high-protein, low-carb keto pizza with a crust made from ground chicken instead of regular dough — perfect for staying on track while feeling like you're cheating!
ingredients: Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to taste
Rao's Margherita pizza sauce (or your favorite low-carb sauce)
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
In a bowl, mix the ground chicken, eggs, parmesan cheese, and seasonings until well combined.
Line a baking sheet or pizza pan with parchment paper.
Spread the chicken mixture evenly on the pan, forming a pizza crust shape about 1/4-inch thick.
Bake the crust for 20 minutes until it firms up and starts to brown.
Remove from oven and add your toppings: spread pizza sauce, sprinkle mozzarella cheese, and add turkey pepperoni.
Return to oven and bake for another 10-12 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let cool for a few minutes, slice into 8 pieces, and enjoy!

pt.title: Pizza de Crosta de Frango
pt.description: Uma pizza keto rica em proteína e baixa em carboidratos com uma crosta feita de frango picado em vez de massa regular — perfeita para manter o plano enquanto sente que está a fazer batota!
ingredients: Tempero italiano, alho em pó, sal e pimenta a gosto
Molho de pizza Rao's Margherita (ou o seu molho favorito low-carb)
instructions: Pré-aqueça o forno a 200°C.
Numa tigela, misture o frango picado, os ovos, o queijo parmesão e os temperos até ficar bem combinado.
Forre um tabuleiro ou forma de pizza com papel vegetal.
Espalhe a mistura de frango uniformemente no tabuleiro, formando uma crosta de pizza com cerca de 0,5 cm de espessura.
Asse a crosta por 20 minutos até ficar firme e começar a dourar.
Retire do forno e adicione as coberturas: espalhe o molho de pizza, polvilhe mozzarella ralada e adicione pepperoni de peru.
Volte ao forno e asse por mais 10-12 minutos até o queijo derreter e borbulhar.
Deixe arrefecer por alguns minutos, corte em 8 fatias e aproveite!

en.title: High Protein Chicken Mozzarella Sticks
en.description: Over 100g of protein in these mozzarella sticks! Instead of breadcrumbs, the outside is seasoned ground chicken rolled in parmesan — high protein, low carb, and delicious.
ingredients: 4 mozzarella sticks (cut in half to make 8 pieces)
instructions: Mix the ground chicken with garlic powder, onion powder, Italian seasoning, and salt.
Divide the seasoned chicken into 8 equal portions.
Flatten each portion into a thin rectangle.
Place a half mozzarella stick in the center of each chicken rectangle.
Wrap the chicken around the mozzarella, sealing completely.
Roll each wrapped stick in parmesan cheese to coat.
Place in air fryer basket.
Air fry at 400°F (200°C) for 12 minutes until golden and cooked through.
Serve with Rao's pizza sauce or your favorite low-carb dipping sauce.

pt.title: Palitos de Mozzarella de Frango com Alta Proteína
pt.description: Mais de 100g de proteína nestes palitos de mozzarella! Em vez de pão ralado, o exterior é frango picado temperado enrolado em parmesão — alta proteína, baixo carboidrato e delicioso.
ingredients: 4 palitos de mozzarella (cortados ao meio para fazer 8 pedaços)
Molho de pizza Rao's para mergulhar (opcional)
instructions: Misture o frango picado com alho em pó, cebola em pó, tempero italiano e sal.
Divida o frango temperado em 8 porções iguais.
Achate cada porção num retângulo fino.
Coloque meio palito de mozzarella no centro de cada retângulo de frango.
Enrole o frango em torno da mozzarella, selando completamente.
Passe cada palito enrolado no queijo parmesão para cobrir.
Coloque no cesto da air fryer.
Frite na air fryer a 200°C por 12 minutos até dourar e cozinhar completamente.
Sirva com molho de pizza Rao's ou o seu molho favorito low-carb para mergulhar.

en.title: Cottage Cheese Edible Cookie Dough
en.description: A high-protein, no-bake cookie dough made with cottage cheese, almond flour, and protein powder — safe to eat raw and absolutely delicious!
instructions: In a blender, combine the cottage cheese, maple syrup, and vanilla extract.
Blend until very smooth and creamy.
Transfer the mixture to a large bowl.
Stir in the almond flour and vanilla protein powder until well incorporated. The mixture will be thick.
Fold in the dark chocolate chips.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Enjoy by the spoonful as a snack or dessert!

pt.title: Massa de Bolachas Comestível de Queijo Cottage
pt.description: Uma massa de bolachas rica em proteína e sem cozedura feita com queijo cottage, farinha de amêndoa e proteína em pó — segura para comer crua e absolutamente deliciosa!
ingredients: 450g de queijo cottage com baixo teor de gordura
2 colheres de chá de extrato de baunilha
1/2 chávena de proteína em pó de baunilha
1 chávena de gotas de chocolate negro
instructions: Num liquidificador, combine o queijo cottage, o xarope de ácer e o extrato de baunilha.
Bata até ficar muito liso e cremoso.
Transfira a mistura para uma tigela grande.
Incorpore a farinha de amêndoa e a proteína em pó de baunilha até ficar bem incorporado. A mistura ficará espessa.
Adicione as gotas de chocolate negro.
Conserve num recipiente hermético no frigorífico.
Aproveite às colheradas como petisco ou sobremesa!

en.title: Frozen Grape Ice Cream
en.description: A refreshing, healthy frozen treat made with just frozen grapes, yogurt, and maple syrup — the yummiest 'ice cream' for summer!
instructions: Place frozen grapes, yogurt, and maple syrup in a blender.
Blend together until smooth and creamy.
Serve immediately for a soft-serve consistency, or transfer to a freezer-safe container and freeze for a firmer ice cream texture.
Enjoy this refreshing summer treat!

pt.title: Gelado de Uvas Congeladas
pt.description: Uma guloseima refrescante e saudável feita apenas com uvas congeladas, iogurte e xarope de ácer — o 'gelado' mais delicioso para o verão!
instructions: Coloque as uvas congeladas, o iogurte e o xarope de ácer num liquidificador.
Bata até ficar liso e cremoso.
Sirva imediatamente para uma consistência de gelado soft, ou transfira para um recipiente próprio para congelador e congele para uma textura de gelado mais firme.
Aproveite esta guloseima refrescante de verão!
